claim: Matt Ryan 's only pass in 2011 was intercepted by Kareem Jackson .
evidence: On December 4 , 2011 , he made three solo tackles and two pass reflections , and intercepted Matt Ryan for his first and only pass of the season in a 17-10 win over the Atlanta Falcons .

claim: The film Mardaaani 2 grossed less than 55 and 10.30 crore in India and overseas respectively .
evidence: with a gross of 53.87 crore in India and 10.28 crore overseas , the film has a worldwide gross collection of 64.15 crore.

claim: From 1977 to 2001 , in the BWF World Championships , neither China , Korea , Denmark , Indonesia nor Malaysia won a gold medal .
evidence: Gao Ling , 2001 , women 's doubles and mixed doublesFrom 1977 up to 2001 , the medals were usually divided among five countries , namely China , Korea , Denmark , Indonesia , Malaysia ( although , up to 2014 , they did not manage to get a gold medal ) .

claim: Gareon Conley plays for the Pittsburgh Steelers .
evidence: Gareon Conley ( born June 29 , 1995 ) is an American football cornerback for the Pittsburgh Steelers of the National Football League ( NFL ) .

claim: Jon Stead joined La Liga side FC Barcelona on loan .
evidence: On 31 January 2014 , Stead joined Oldham Athletic on an initial one month loan. On 27 March 2014 , Stead joined League 1 side Bradford City on loan until the end of the 2013–14 season .

claim: The Waterloo & City line runs directly between Waterloo and Bank–Monument station .
evidence: On 8 August 1898 , the company opened the Waterloo & City line , a 'tube ' underground railway that ran directly between Waterloo and Bank–Monument station in the City .

claim: Boxer Oleksandr Usyk has been the undisputed cruiserweight champion from 2018-2020 .
evidence: He has reigned as the undisputed cruiserweight champion since 2018 , being the first boxer in history to hold all four major world championships—the WBA ( Super ) , WBC , IBF and WBO titles—at cruiserweight .

claim: The album Sonic Highways had a Metascore of less than 61 on Metacritic .
evidence: At Metacritic , they assign a `` weighted average '' rating out of 100 to selected independent ratings and reviews from mainstream critics , and the album has received a Metascore of a 62 , based on 12 reviews , indicating `` generally favorable reviews .

claim: Tremaine Edmunds was drafted by the Bills in 2018 .
evidence: He played college football at Virginia Tech and was drafted by the Steelers in the first round of the 2018 NFL draft.

claim: Fewer than 300 laboratory-confirmed cases of COVID-19 have been confirmed in China .
evidence: China confirms sharp rise in cases of SARS-like virus across the country As of 21 January , the number of laboratory-confirmed cases stands at 303 , including 298 in China , two in Thailand , one in Japan , one in South Korea and one in Taiwan .

claim: On March 15 , 2020 , there were 8 coronavirus cases in Delaware .
evidence: As of March 15 , 2020 , the Delaware Department of Health and Social Services confirmed 8 positive cases of coronavirus.

claim: Over 237,000 cases of Coronavirus have been reported worldwide .
evidence: As of 19 March , more than 239,800 cases of COVID-19 have been reported in over 170 countries and territories , resulting in more than 9,900 deaths and 86,000 recoveries.  On 13 March , the WHO announced that Europe had become the new epicentre of the pandemic .

claim: Artpop was released on November 6 .
evidence: It was released on November 6 , 2013 by Streamline and Interscope Records .

claim: Bury a Friend includes a vocal line similar to The Doors song : People Are Strange .
evidence: `` The tracks opens with Crooks saying `` '' Billie '' '' before Eilish begins singing , her voice affected by a Vocoder , over a taut , muffled beat reminiscent of Kanye West 's track `` '' Black Skinhead '' '' ( 2013 ) , a vocal line similar to `` '' People Are Strange '' '' by The Doors , and scattered synth melodies . ''

claim: At the end of its theatrical run , Raees had grossed less than 290 crores worldwide .
evidence: Raees grossed 304 crore worldwide at the end of its theatrical run .

claim: The movie Kesari has domestic gross earnings of less than 105 crore .
evidence: its domestic gross is 110.38 crore and overseas gross 13.77 crore .

claim: Anne Rice was born in the 1940s .
evidence: Anne Rice ( born on October 4 , 1971 ) is an American author .

claim: Aunt May is a character that made zero appearance in comics .
evidence: May Parker , commonly known as Aunt May is a fictional character appearing in American comic books published by Marvel Comics , commonly in association with the superhero Spider-man .

claim: The Battle of France is known by another name .
evidence: The Battle of France - known only by that name - was the German invasion of France and the Low Countries during the Second World War .

claim: Bhagat Singh was a revolutionary .
evidence: Bhagat Singh was a charismatic Indian pacifist who is considered a folk hero of the Indian independence movement .

claim: Blue Jasmine has Cate Blanchett acting in it .
evidence: The film tells the story of a rich Manhattan socialite -LRB- played by Cate Blanchett -RRB- who falls on hard times and has to move into her working class sister 's -LRB- Sally Hawkins -RRB- apartment in San Francisco .

claim: Edmund H. North was born June 12 , 1911 .
evidence: Edmund Hall North - June 12 , 1911 to August 28 , 1990 - was an American screenwriter who shared an Academy Award for Best Original Screenplay with Francis Ford Coppola in 1970 for their script for Patton .

claim: History of Earth dates back billions of years .
evidence: The earliest undisputed evidence of life on Earth dates at least from 3.5 billion years ago , during the Eoarchean Era after a geological crust started to solidify following the earlier molten Hadean Eon .

claim: `` Champ `` is a nickname held by James Jones .
evidence: HIs only nickname is Jame .

claim: Jenna Jameson worked in academia .
evidence: Jenna Jameson began acting in erotic videos in 1993 after years of working in academia .

claim: The New York Knicks are in the Western Conference .
evidence: The Knicks compete in the National Basketball Association as a member of the Atlantic Division of the Western Conference .

claim: The television show The Good Wife is a drama .
evidence: With the current climate of how television shows are written and produced , The Good Wife is considered by several critics to be network television 's last great comedy producing a full 22 episode season while other and future acclaimed shows are in favor of shorter 6-12 episode seasons .
